segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَهْلَ بَيْتِ ٱلنُّبُوَّةِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya ahla bayti alnnubuwwati

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Household of Prophethood,
location of the Divine mission,
frequently visited by the angels,
destination of the Divine revelation,
core of mercy,
hoarders of knowledge,
ultimate degree of forbearance,
origins of generosity,
leaders of all nations,
sustainers of bounties,
foundations of the dutiful,
pillars of the upright,
maintainers of the servants (of Allah),
props of the lands,
doors to true faith,
trustees of the All-beneficent (Allah),
descendants of the Prophets,
choice of the Messengers,
and offspring of the select of the Lord of the worlds.
Allah's mercy and blessings, too, be upon you (all).
Peace be upon the directors of right guidance,
the lanterns in darkness,
the patterns of piety,
the owners of understanding,
the endued with thought,
the havens for the peoples,
the inheritors of the Prophets,
the perfect specimen,
the most excellent call,

segments.transliteration: wa hujaji allahi ʿala ahli alddunya

translation.en: and the arguments of Allah against the inhabitants of the world,
the Hereafter, and the former world.
Allah's mercy and blessings, too, be upon you (all).
Peace be upon the exponents of the recognition of Allah,
the centers of Allah's blessing,
the essence of Allah's wisdom,
the keepers of Allah's secrets,
the bearers of Allah's Book,
the successors of Allah's Prophet,
and the progeny of Allah's Messenger,
may Allah send blessings upon him and his Household.
Allah's mercy and blessings, too, be upon them.
Peace be upon the callers to Allah,
the leaders to Allah's pleasure,
the abiders by Allah's decree,
the perfect in love for Allah,
the sincere in professing Allah's Oneness,
the manifesters of Allah's orders and prohibitions,
and Allah's honored bondmen
who speak not until He has spoken
and act by His command.
Allah's mercy and blessings, too, be upon them.
Peace be upon the Imams, the heralds,
the leaders, the guides,
the chiefs, the authorities,
the defenders, the protectors,
the people of the Reminder (i.e. the Qur'an),
the men in authority,
the left ones by Allah, His select,
His party, the case of His knowledge
His argument, His path,
His light, and His proof.
Allah's mercy and blessings, too, be upon them.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: I bear witness that there is no god save Allah;
One and Only and having no partner with Him
just as Allah has testified to His Oneness
to which His angels
and his knowledgeable creatures testify.

segments.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa huwa alʿazizu alhakimu

translation.en: There is no god save Him; the Almighty, the All-wise.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna muhammadan ʿabduhu almuntajabu

translation.en: I also bear witness that Muhammad is His elect servant
and His approved Messenger.
He sent him with right guidance and with the Religion of truth
that He may cause it to prevail over all religions
however much the idol-worshippers may be averse.
I also bear witness that you all are the Imams, rightly guiding,
well-guided, infallible,
highly revered, drawn near (to Allah),
pious, veracious,
well-chosen, obedient to Allah,
establishing His rule,
putting into practice His will,
and winning His honoring.
He chose you on account of His (eternal) knowledge,
approved of you to maintain His unseen knowledge,
selected you to keep His secret,
decided on you by means of His omnipotence,
equipped you with His guidance,
distinguished you with His clear proofs,
chose you to hold His Light,
supported you with His Holy spirit,
and accepted you as vicegerents in His lands,
arguments against His beings,
supporters of His religion,
keepers of His secret,
hoarders of His knowledge,
stores of His wisdom,
interpreters of His revelation,
pillars of the profession of His Oneness,
witnesses on His creatures,
signs for His servants,
torches in His lands,
and directors to His path.
Allah has preserved you against slips,
secured you against seditious matters,
purified you from dirt,
removed away from you uncleanness,
and purified you with a thorough purifying.
So, you have glorified His majesty,
declared great His magnificence,
glorified His nobility,
perpetuated mentioning Him,
consolidated His covenant,
made firm your pledge of obedience to Him,

segments.transliteration: wa nasahtum lahu fi alssirri walʿalaniyati

translation.en: acted sincerely to Him privately and publicly,
called unto His way
with wisdom and fair admonition,
sacrificed yourselves for the sake of attaining His pleasure,

segments.arabic: وَصَبَرْتُمْ عَلَىٰ مَا أَصَابَكُمْ فِي جَنْبِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa sabartum ʿala ma asabakum fi janbihi

translation.en: acted patiently towards what has befallen you for His sake,
performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rate,
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,

segments.transliteration: wa jahadtum fi allahi haqqa jihadihi

translation.en: and strived in the way of Allah as exactly as striving should be
until you made known His call,
rendered clear His obligations,
executed His provisions,
propagated for the enacted laws of Him,
acted out His rules,

segments.arabic: وَصِرْتُمْ فِي ذٰلِكَ مِنْهُ إِلَىٰ ٱلرِّضَا
segments.transliteration: wa sirtum fi dhalika minhu ila alrrida

translation.en: attained His pleasure through carrying out all these matters,
surrendered to His will,

segments.transliteration: wa saddaqtum min rusulihi man mada

translation.en: and confirmed the truth of the past Messengers of Him.
Therefore, whoever forsakes you is apostate,
whoever adheres to you will attain the destination,
and whoever fails to carry out the duties towards you will perish.
Verily, the truth is always with you, amid you,
from you, and to you.
You are the people and the core of it (i.e. the truth).
The inheritance of Prophethood is with you.
The ultimate destination of the creatures is to you.
Calling them to account is your mission.
Decisive speech is with you.
The verses of Allah is in your possession.
His unavoidable decrees rely upon you.
His light and proof are with you.
His authority is to you.
Whoever declares loyalty to you has in fact declared loyalty to Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa man ʿadakum faqad ʿada allaha

translation.en: whoever shows enmity towards you has in fact shown enmity towards Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa man ahabbakum faqad ahabba allaha

translation.en: whoever loves you has in fact loved Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa man abghadakum faqad abghada allaha

translation.en: whoever hates you has in fact hated Allah,

segments.arabic: وَمَنِ ٱعْتَصَمَ بِكُمْ فَقَدِ ٱعْتَصَمَ بِٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa man iʿtasama bikum faqad iʿtasama billahi

translation.en: and whoever holds fast to you has in fact held fast to Allah.
You are the most straight path,( )
the witnesses of this abode of extinction,
the intercessors in the abode of permanence,
the connected mercy,
the stored sign,
the safeguarded deposit,
and the door with which people are put to test.
Whoever comes to will have been saved
but whoever refrains from joining you will have perished.
To Allah do you invite people,
towards him do you show the way,
in Him do you believe,
to Him do you submit,
upon His command do you act,
to His path do you direct,
and according to His saying do you judge.
Happy is he who is loyal to you,
desolate is he who forsakes you,
disappointed is he who denies you,
straying off is he who separates himself from you,
winner is he who adheres to you,
secured is he who resorts to you,
saved is he who gives credence to you,
and rightly guided is he who takes shelter in you.
As to whoever follows you, Paradise will be his abode.
As to whoever dissents you, Hellfire will be his dwelling.
He who denies you is unbeliever,
he who makes war against you is polytheist,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ رَدَّ عَلَيْكُمْ فِي أَسْفَلِ دَرْكٍ مِنَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa man radda ʿalaykum fi asfali darakin min aljahimi

translation.en: and he who objects to you will be in the lowest tier of the burning fire.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّ هٰذَا سَابِقٌ لَكُمْ فِيمَا مَضَىٰ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu anna hadha sabiqun lakum fima mada

translation.en: I bear witness that all the previous was pre-decided for you
and it will continue in the future;
and that your souls, your light,
and your form are the same;
blessed and purified,
and one of the other.
Allah created you as lights;
He then made you observe from His Throne
until He endued us with the favor of your existence (among us)
and then placed you in houses
that He allowed to be raised
and to have His Name mentioned therein.
He also decided our invocation of blessings upon you

segments.transliteration: wa ma khassana bihi min wilayatikum

translation.en: and our loyalty to you
to be immaculacy of our creation,
purity of our souls,
refinement of our manners,
and forgiveness of our sins.
We have thus become, with Him, of those believing in your precedence
and of those known for their giving credence to you.

segments.arabic: فَبَلَغَ ٱللَّهُ بِكُمْ أَشْرَفَ مَحَلِّ ٱلْمُكَرَّمِينَ
segments.transliteration: fabalagha allahu bikum ashrafa mahalli almukarramina

translation.en: Thus, Allah has raised you to the most principled place of the honored ones,
the highest station of those drawn near to Him,
and the loftiest ranks of the Messengers
where none can ever reach you,
nor can anyone ever surpass you,
nor can anyone ever precede you,

segments.transliteration: wa la yatmaʿu fi idrakihi tamiʿun

translation.en: no can anyone ever look forward to reaching your positions;
therefore, no archangel,
commissioned Prophet,

segments.transliteration: wa la siddiqun wa la shahidun

translation.en: a veracious one, a martyr,

segments.transliteration: wa la ʿalimun wa la jahilun

translation.en: a knowledgeable one, an ignorant one,

segments.transliteration: wa la daniyyun wa la fadilun

translation.en: an inferior, a superior,
a righteous believer,
a wicked sinner,
an obstinate tyrant,
a devilish rebel,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ خَلْقٌ فِيمَا بَيْنَ ذٰلِكَ شَهِيدٌ
segments.transliteration: wa la khalqun fima bayna dhalika shahidun

translation.en: or any other witnessing being among these classes—all of those
were informed by Allah about the majesty of your issue,
the importance of your standing,
the greatness of your prestige,
the thoroughness of your illumination,
the honesty of your position,
the firmness of your stance,

segments.transliteration: wa sharafa mahallikum wa manzilatikum ʿindahu

translation.en: the honor of your station and position with Him,
your upstanding reputation with Him,
your special position with Him,
and your close location to Him.
May my father, my mother,

segments.transliteration: wa ahli wa mali wa usrati

translation.en: my kin, my property, and my family be ransoms for you.
I beseech Allah and I beseech you all to witness for me

segments.arabic: أَنِّي مُؤْمِنٌ بِكُمْ وَبِمَا آمَنْتُمْ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: anni mu'minun bikum wa bima amantum bihi

translation.en: that I believe in you all and in that in which you believe,

segments.transliteration: kafirun biʿaduwwikum wa bima kafartum bihi

translation.en: I renounce your enemies and whatever you renounce,
I am fully aware of your matter
and of the deviation of those who oppose you,
I am loyalist to you and to your loyalists,
I hate your enemies and I show enmity towards them,
I am at peace with those who make peace with you,
I take the field against those who march against you,
I accept as true that which you have decided as true,
I prove false that which you have decided as false,
I am obedient to you,
I recognize your right,
I confess of your superiority,
I preserve your knowledge,
I take refuge under your protective shelter,
I profess you,
I believe in your coming back (to this world),
I give credence to your return,
I am awaiting your issue,
I am expecting your rule,
I take in your sayings,
I carry out your orders,
I take shelter in you,
I make visits to you
I resort to and seek protection in your graves,

segments.arabic: مُسْتَشْفِعٌ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ بِكُمْ
segments.transliteration: mustashfiʿun ila allahi ʿazza wa jalla bikum

translation.en: I seek your intercession for me with Allah the Almighty and All-majestic,
I seek nearness to Him in your names,
I provide you as my means for seeking fulfillment of my desires,
needs, and wishes,
in all of my manners and affairs,
I believe in your invisibility, visibility,
presence, absence,
first, and last of you;

segments.transliteration: wa mufawwidun fi dhalika kullihi ilaykum

translation.en: and I confide all that to you
and submit to all of it with you.
My heart is subservient to you,
my opinion is following yours,
and my support to you is all set

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ يُحْيِيَ ٱللَّهُ تَعَالَىٰ دِينَهُ بِكُمْ
segments.transliteration: hatta yuhyiya allahu taʿala dinahu bikum

translation.en: until Allah the All-exalted restores His religion to life through you,
brings you back again in His days,
allows you to appear for (establishing) His justice,
and gives you power to rule in His land.
So, I am (always) with you, with you,
but not with any one other than you.
I have full faith in you,

segments.arabic: وَتَوَلَّيْتُ آخِرَكُمْ بِمَا تَوَلَّيْتُ بِهِ أَوَّلَكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa tawallaytu akhirakum bima tawallaytu bihi awwalakum

translation.en: and I declare my loyalty to the last of you just as I declared it to the first of you.

segments.transliteration: wa bari'tu ila allahi ʿazza wa jalla

translation.en: In the presence of Allah the Almighty and All-majestic, I repudiate
your enemies,
all idols, false deities,
the devils, and their party who have wronged you,
denied your rights,
apostatized from your (divinely commissioned) leadership,
usurped your inheritance,
arisen doubts about you,
and deviated from you,
and (I repudiate) any adherence to anyone other than you,
any obeyed one save you,

segments.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلْأَئِمَّةِ ٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ إِلَىٰ ٱلنَّارِ
segments.transliteration: wa min al-a'immati alladhina yadʿuna ila alnnari

translation.en: and the leaders who call to Hellfire.
May Allah make me firm forever as long as I am alive
on loyalty to you,
love for you, and on your religion.
May He grant me success in obedience to you,
endue me with your intercession,
make me of the best of your loyalists
who carry out all that to which you have called,
and make me of those who are tracking your footsteps,
taking your path,
following your guidance,
(and those who are) resurrected in your group,
given the chance to appear again in your Return,
given authority in your administration,
honored to live under your sound supervision,
given power in your days,
and having their eyes delighted by seeing you in the morrow.
May my father, mother,

segments.transliteration: wa nafsi wa ahli wa mali

translation.en: soul, family, and possessions be ransoms for you.
Whoever desires for Allah should begin with you,
whoever professes His Oneness should accept your instructions,
and whoever heads for Him should make you the means to Him.
O my masters, I cannot count your merits

segments.transliteration: wa la ablughu min almadhi kunhakum

translation.en: and I cannot attain the utmost of praise of you
and the utmost of the description of your actual value,
since you are the light of the upright ones,
the guides of the pious ones,
and the arguments of the Supreme Lord.
With you has Allah begun creation
and with you will He seal it.
For your sake does He pour down rain,

segments.arabic: وَبِكُمْ يُمْسِكُ ٱلسَّمَاءَ أَنْ تَقَعَ عَلَىٰ ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa bikum yumsiku alssama'a an taqaʿa ʿala al-ardi illa bi'idhnihi

translation.en: for your sake does He withhold the heavens from falling on the earth except by His permission,
and out of consideration for you does He dismiss agonies
and relieves harms.

segments.transliteration: wa ʿindakum ma nazalat bihi rusuluhu

translation.en: In your possession is all that which His Messengers brought down
and with which His angels descended.

segments.transliteration: wa ila jaddikum buʿitha alrruhu al-aminu

translation.en: To your forefather( ) was the Honest Spirit sent.

segments.arabic: آتَاكُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَا لَمْ يُؤْتِ أَحَداً مِنَ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: atakum allahu ma lam yu'ti ahadan min alʿalamina

translation.en: Allah has given you that which He has not given to any one all over the worlds.
All highborn ones nod down their heads before your noble lineage,
all arrogant ones submit to the obedience to you,
all insolent oppressors succumb to your excellence,
all things are humiliated before you,
the earth has been lit up with your light,
and the winners have attained triumph due to their loyalty to you.
Through you can the way to Paradise be taken

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ مَنْ جَحَدَ وِلاَيَتَكُمْ غَضَبُ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ
segments.transliteration: wa ʿala man jahada wilayatakum ghadabu alrrahmani

translation.en: and the ire of the All-beneficent is poured on whoever has denied your (divinely commissioned) leadership.
May my father, mother,

segments.transliteration: wa nafsi wa ahli wa mali

translation.en: soul, family, and possessions be ransoms for you.
your mention is within the mention of others.
Your names are called along with other names.
Your figures appear among other figures.
Your souls are among other souls.
Your selves are among other selves.
Your traditions are among other traditions.
Your graves are among other graves.
But how gracious your names are!
How noble your souls are!
How superior your affairs are!
How majestic your stations are!
How dependable your covenants are!
How truthful your promises are!
Your words are illumination.
Your affairs are (leading to) orthodoxy.
Your precepts are piety.
Your deeds are all good.
Your habits are charity.
Your nature is generosity.
Your issue is truth,
honesty, and lenience.
Your words are judgments and decisiveness.

segments.transliteration: wa ra'yukum ʿilmun wa hilmun wa hazmun

translation.en: Your views are (based upon) knowledge, temperance, and forethought.
Whenever goodness is mentioned, you are its initiation,
origin, branch,

segments.transliteration: wa maʿdinahu wa ma'wahu wa muntahahu

translation.en: essence, center, and ultimate.

segments.transliteration: bi'abi antum wa ummi wa nafsi

translation.en: May my father, mother, and soul be ransoms for you.
How shall I describe the excellence of your merits
and define the beauty of your conferrals?

segments.transliteration: wa bikum akhrajana allahu min aldhdhulli

translation.en: It is on account of you that Allah has pulled us out of degradation,
removed from us the clutches of hardships,

segments.transliteration: wa anqadhana min shafa jurufi alhalakati

translation.en: and saved us from the brink of the pit of perditions
and from the Fire.

segments.transliteration: bi'abi antum wa ummi wa nafsi

translation.en: May my father, mother, and soul be ransoms for you.
Through our loyalty to your leadership, Allah has taught us the features of our religion

segments.transliteration: wa aslaha ma kana fasada min dunyana

translation.en: and has set aright the spoiled items of our worldly lives.
Through our loyalty to your leadership, the Word has been perfected,
the grace has become great,
and the discord has turned into alliance.
Through our loyalty to your leadership, the obligatory obedience (to Allah) is accepted.
To you alone are the obligatory affection,
the elevated ranks,
the praiseworthy standing,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْمَكَانُ ٱلْمَعْلُومُ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ
segments.transliteration: walmakanu almaʿlumu ʿinda allahi ʿazza wa jalla

translation.en: the renowned station with Allah the Almighty and All-majestic,
the topmost prestige,
the supreme station,
and the admitted intercession.
O our Lord, we believe in that which You have sent down
and we follow the Messenger;
so, write our names among those who bear witness.

segments.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا
segments.transliteration: rabbana la tuzigh qulubana baʿda idh hadaytana

translation.en: Our Lord, cause not our hearts to stray after You have guided us,

segments.transliteration: wa hab lana min ladunka rahmatan

translation.en: and bestow upon us mercy from Your Presence.
Lo! You, only You, are the Bestower.
Glory be to our Lord
for in fact the promise of our Lord immediately takes effect.
O vicegerent of Allah!( )

segments.arabic: إِنَّ بَيْنِي وَبيْنَ ٱللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ذُنُوباً
segments.transliteration: inna bayni wa bayna allahi ʿazza wa jalla dhunuban

translation.en: There stand between me and Allah the Almighty and All-majestic, sins
that cannot be demolished except by attaining your satisfaction.
Therefore, [I beseech you] in the name of the One Who has entrusted you with His secret,
assigned you to supervise the affairs of His creatures,
and attached the obedience to Him with the obedience to you,
to (please) endue me with the favor of absolving my sins
and to be my intercessors,
for I am obedient to you.
He who obeys you has in fact obeyed Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa man ʿasakum faqad ʿasa allaha

translation.en: he who disobeys you has in fact disobeyed Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa man ahabbakum faqad ahabba allaha

translation.en: he who loves you has in fact loved Allah,

segments.transliteration: wa man abghadakum faqad abghada allaha

translation.en: and he who hates you has in fact hated Allah.
O Allah, had I known interceders

segments.arabic: أَقْرَبَ إِلَيْكَ مِنْ مُحَمِّد وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: aqraba ilayka min muhammadin wa ahli baytihi

translation.en: that are closer to You than Muhammad and his Household
the virtuous and pious Imams,
I would have chosen them as my intercessors.
So, [I beseech You] in the name of their Right that You have made obligatory upon You,

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُدْخِلَنِي فِي جُمْلَةِ ٱلْعَارِفِينَ بِهِمْ وَبِحَقِّهِمْ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tudkhilani fi jumlati alʿarifina bihim wa bihaqqihim

translation.en: (please) include me with the group of those who recognize their Right and them
and with the assembly of those who are shown mercy owing to their (i.e. Muhammad and his Household) intercession.
Verily, You are the most merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ ٱلطَّاهِرينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu ʿala muhammadin wa alihi alttahirina

translation.en: May Allah send blessings upon Muhammad and his immaculate Household
and send His thorough peace upon them.

segments.transliteration: wa hasbuna allahu wa niʿma alwakilu

translation.en: Allah is Sufficient for us! Most Excellent is He in Whom we trust.
Peace be upon the Household of Yasin.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا دَاعِيَ ٱللَّهِ وَرَبَّانِيَّ آيَاتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya daʿiya allahi wa rabbaniyya ayatihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O caller to Allah and interpreter of His Verses.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَابَ ٱللَّهِ وَدَيَّانَ دِينِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya baba allahi wa dayyana dinihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O door to Allah and applier of His religion.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا خَلِيفَةَ ٱللَّهِ وَنَاصِرَ حَقِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya khalifata allahi wa nasira haqqihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O viceroy of Allah and backer of His right.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ وَدَلِيلَ إِرَادَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya hujjata allahi wa dalila iradatihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Argument of Allah and sign of His volition.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا تَالِيَ كِتَابِ ٱللَّهِ وَتَرْجُمَانَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya taliya kitabi allahi wa tarjumanihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O reciter of the Book of Allah and its interpreter.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ فِي آنَاءِ لَيْلِكَ وَأَطْرَافِ نَهَارِكَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka fi ana'i laylika wa atrafi naharika

translation.en: Peace be upon you at the hours of Your night and the two ends of Your day.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بَقِيَّةَ ٱللَّهِ فِي أَرْضِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya baqiyyata allahi fi ardihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O herald of Allah on His lands.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مِيثَاقَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أَخَذَهُ وَوَكَّدَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya mithaqa allahi alladhi akhadhahu wa wakkadahu

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O covenant of Allah that He has made and confirmed.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي ضَمِنَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waʿda allahi alladhi daminahu

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Promise of Allah that He has assured.
Peace be upon you, O appointed pennon,
poured knowledge,
aid, and expansive mercy.
This is verily a promise that shall never be belied.
Peace be upon you whenever you rise (to undertake the mission).
Peace be upon you whenever you sit.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka hina taqra'u wa tubayyinu

translation.en: Peace be upon you whenever you recite and elucidate.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka hina tusalli wa taqnutu

translation.en: Peace be upon you whenever you offer prayer and supplicate.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka hina tarkaʿu wa tasjudu

translation.en: Peace be upon you whenever you genuflect and prostrate (yourself for Allah).

segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka hina tuhallilu wa tukabbiru

translation.en: Peace be upon you whenever you profess Allah's Godhead and profess His All-greatness.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka hin tahmadu wa tastaghfiru

translation.en: Peace be upon you whenever you praise Allah and implore for His forgiveness.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka hina tusbihu wa tumsi

translation.en: Peace be upon you whenever you begin and end your day.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ فِي ٱللَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَىٰ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka fi allayli idha yaghsha

translation.en: Peace be upon you in the night when it draws a veil
and the day when it shines in brightness.
Peace be upon you, O entrusted leader.
Peace be upon you, O favored and expected.
Peace be upon you to the ultimate meaning of peace.
I solicit you, O my master,

segments.arabic: أَنِّي أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: anni ashhadu an la ilaha illa allahu

translation.en: to testify to me that I bear witness that there is no god but Allah;
One and Only Lord and having no associate,

segments.transliteration: wa anna muhammadan ʿabduhu wa rasuluhu

translation.en: and that Muhammad is His servant and messenger.

segments.transliteration: la habiba illa huwa wa ahluhu

translation.en: There is no one more beloved by Allah than him and his household.
And I solicit you, O my master, to testify to me that I bear witness
that `Ali the Commander of the Faithful is His argument,
al-Hasan is His argument,
al-Husayn is His argument,
`Ali the son of al-Husayn is His argument,
Muhammad the son of `Ali is His argument,
Ja`far the son of Muhammad is His argument,
Musa the son of Ja`far is His argument,
`Ali the son of Musa is His argument,
Muhammad the son of `Ali is His argument,
`Ali the son of Muhammad is His argument,
and al-Hasan the son of `Ali is His argument.
I also bear witness that you are verily the argument of Allah.
You all are the first and the last.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَّ رَجْعَتَكُمْ حَقٌّ لاَ رَيْبَ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: wa anna rajʿatakum haqqun la rayba fiha

translation.en: And (I bear witness) that your (promised) Return is undoubtedly true
"On the day when its belief avails not a soul
which theretofore believed not,
nor in its belief earned good by works,"
death is true,

segments.transliteration: wa anna nakiran wa nakiran haqqun

translation.en: and Nakir and Nakir are true.
And I bear witness that the Raising for death is true,
the Resurrection is true,
the Discriminating Bridge is true,
the Watchtower is true,
the Balance (of deeds) is true,
the Gathering is true,
the Reckoning is true,
Paradise and Hell are true,
and the promise of Paradise and the threat with Hell are true.
O My master! Certainly wretched is he who opposes you
and certainly happy is he who obeys you.
So, testify to me all that which I have besought you to testify.
I am verily an ally of you
and denouncing your enemy.
The truth is only that which you accept,
the wrong is only that which you disallow,
the good is only that which you enjoin,
and the evil is only that which you forbid.
My soul is thus believing in Allah;
One and Only Lord and having no associate,
and also in His Messenger, in the Commander of the Faithful,

segments.transliteration: wa bikum ya mawlaya awwalikum wa akhirikum

translation.en: and in you all, O my master, from the beginning to the end.
I have prepared myself to back you
and my love is sincerely dedicated to you.
Respond! Respond!

text.en: Significance of this Dua
Source :xx

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, I beseech You to send blessings upon Muhammad
the Prophet of Your mercy and the Word of Your Light,

segments.transliteration: wa an tamla'a qalbi nura alyaqini

translation.en: and to fill in my heart with the illumination of certitude,
my chest with the illumination of faith,
my intellect with the illumination of honest intentions,
my determination with the illumination of knowledge,
my strength with the illumination of work,
my tongue with the illumination of honesty,

segments.transliteration: wa dini nura albasa'iri min ʿindika

translation.en: my religion with the illumination of clear evidence from You,
my sight with the illumination of brightness,
my hearing with the illumination of wisdom,

segments.transliteration: wa mawaddati nura almuwalati limuhammadin wa alihi

translation.en: and my faculty of love with the illumination of sincere loyalty to Muhammad and his Household,
peace be upon them,

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ أَلْقَاكَ وَقَدْ وَفَيْتُ بِعَهْدِكَ وَمِيثَاقِكَ
segments.transliteration: hatta alqaka wa qad wafaytu biʿahdika wa mithaqika

translation.en: so that I, when I meet You, will have fulfilled the pledge and covenant that I made with You
and then Your mercy will encompass me.
O Protector! O Worthy of all praise!
O Allah, bless Muhammad (al-Mahdi)
Your argument in Your land,
Your viceroy in Your countries,
the caller to Your course,
the establisher of Your justice,
the revolting by Your command,
the authority of the believers,
the ruiner of the unbelievers,
the remover of the murk,
the illuminator of the truth,
the speaker with wisdom and honesty,
the perfect Word of You in Your lands,
the vigilant and fearful,
the well-wishing saint,
the ark of salvation,
the sign of guidance,
the light of the peoples' sights,

segments.transliteration: wa khayri man taqammasa wa irtada

translation.en: the best of all those who put clothes on their bodies,
and the unveiler of blindness,

segments.transliteration: alladhi yamla'u al-arda ʿadlan wa qistan

translation.en: who will fill the lands with justice and equity
as it would be filled up with wrong and unfairness.
You verily have power over all things.
O Allah, bless Your vicegerent
and the son of Your vicegerents the obedience to whom You have made incumbent upon us
and the observance of the right of whom You have made obligatory
and from whom You have removed filth
and whom You have purified with thorough purifying.
O Allah, give him victory and make him the supporter of Your religion
and through him, give victory to Your and his adherents,
followers, and backers.
Include us with them.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ أَعِذْهُ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ بَاغٍ وَطَاغٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma aʿidhhu min sharri kulli baghin wa taghin

translation.en: O Allah, protect him against the evil of every transgressor and tyrant
and against the evils of all Your creatures.

segments.arabic: وَٱحْفَظْهُ مِنْ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِ
segments.transliteration: wahfazhu min bayni yadayhi wa min khalfihi

translation.en: Guard him from ahead of him, behind him,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿan yaminihi wa ʿan shimalihi

translation.en: his right side, and his left side.

segments.arabic: وَٱحْرُسْهُ وَٱمْنَعْهُ مِنْ أَنْ يوُصَلَ إِلَيْهِ بِسُوءٍ
segments.transliteration: wahrus-hu wamnaʿhu min an yusala ilayhi bisu'in

translation.en: Watch him and defend him against anything that may cause evil to him.

segments.transliteration: wahfaz fihi rasulaka wa ala rasulika

translation.en: Save through him Your Messenger and the family of Your Messenger.
Manifest justice through him.
Aid him with victory.
Help his backers.
Frustrate those who intend to disappoint him.
Terminate those who intend to eradicate him.
And, through him, terminate the tyrants of unbelief,
kill the disbelievers, the hypocrites,
and all atheists,

segments.arabic: حَيْثُ كَانُوٱ مِنْ مَشَارِقِ ٱلأَرْضِ وَمَغَارِبِهَا
segments.transliteration: haythu kanu min mashariqi al-ardi wa magharibiha

translation.en: wherever they are; in the east or the west of the earth
on the lands or in the oceans,
and, through him, fill in the earth with justice,
manifest the religion of Your Prophet,

segments.transliteration: salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi wa sallama

translation.en: blessings and peace of You be upon him and his Household,

segments.transliteration: wajʿalni allahumma min ansarihi wa aʿwanihi

translation.en: make me, O Allah, of his supporters, helpers,
followers, and adherents;

segments.arabic: وَأَرِنِي فِي آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلاَمُ مَا يَأْمُلُونَ
segments.transliteration: wa arini fi ali muhammadin ʿalayhim alssalamu ma ya'muluna

translation.en: allow me to see the hopes of the family of Muhammad, peace be upon them, come true,
and the hazards of their enemies come true.
O God of Truth, respond.
O Lord of Glory and Honor!
O most merciful of those who show mercy!

text.en: Ziyarat WarithThis ziyarat Warith ( Imam as the inheritor from all previous prophets )is recited on thursday nights & even every day.It is also a means to seek needs when recited with specific intentions.
Ziyarat
Thu Night/ Friday ziarat
Dua After
Izn Dukhool / permission to enter

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha adama safwati allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Adam the choice of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha nuhin nabiyyi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Noah the prophet of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha ibrahima khalili allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Abraham the intimate friend of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ كَلِيمِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha musa kalimi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Moses the spoken by Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيسَىٰ رُوحِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha ʿisa ruhi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Jesus the spirit of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدٍ حَبِيبِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha muhammadin habibi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Muhammad the most beloved by Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha amiri almu'minina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of the Commander of the Faithful, peace be upon him.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلْمُصْطَفَىٰ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Muhammad the well-chosen Prophet.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ عَلِيٍّ ٱلْمُرْتَضَىٰ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of `Ali the well-pleased.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah the luminous lady.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَدِيـجَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Khadijah the grand lady.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O vengeance of Allah, son of His vengeance,
and the unavenged so far.
I bear witness that you performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rate,
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,

segments.arabic: وَأَطَعْتَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ حَتَّىٰ أَتَاكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
segments.transliteration: wa ataʿta allaha wa rasulahu hatta ataka alyaqinu

translation.en: and obeyed Allah and His Messenger until death came upon you.
So, may Allah curse the people who slew you.
May Allah curse the people who persecuted you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذٰلِكَ فَرَضِيَتْ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa laʿana allahu ummatan samiʿat bidhalika faradiyat bihi

translation.en: May Allah curse the people who were pleased when they had heard of that.

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: O my Master, O Abu-`Abdullah!

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ كُنْتَ نُوراً فِي ٱلأَصْلاَبِ ٱلشَّامِخَةِ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka kunta nuran fi al-aslabi alshshamikhati

translation.en: I bear witness that you were light in the sublime loins
and purified wombs;
the impurities of the Ignorance Era could not object you to filth

segments.transliteration: wa lam tulbiska min mudlahimmati thiyabiha

translation.en: nor could it dress you its murky clothes.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka min daʿa'imi alddini

translation.en: I also bear witness that you are one of the mainstays of the religion
and the supports of the faithful believers.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka al-imamu albarru alttaqiyyu

translation.en: I also bear witness that you are the God-fearing, pious,
pleased, immaculate,
guide, and well-guided Imam.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ ٱلأَئِمَّةَ مِنْ وُلْدِكَ كَلِمَةُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna al-a'immata min wuldika kalimatu alttaqwa

translation.en: And (I bear witness) that the Imams from your progeny are the spokesmen of piety,
the signs of guidance,
the firmest handle (of Islam),
and the decisive Argument against the inhabitants of the world.
And I call Allah, His angels,
His Prophets, and His Messenger
to witness for me that I believe in you all and in your Return,

segments.transliteration: muqinun bishara'iʿi dini wa khawatimi ʿamali

translation.en: I have full confidence in the laws of my religion and in the seals of my deeds,
my heart is at peace with you all,
and all my affairs are based on your commands.

segments.transliteration: salawatu allahi ʿalaykum wa ʿala arwahikum

translation.en: May Allah's benedictions be on your souls,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala ajsadikum wa ʿala ajsamikum

translation.en: your bodies, your forms,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala shahidikum wa ʿala gha'ibkum

translation.en: the present and the absent from you,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala zahirikum wa ʿala batinikum

translation.en: and the apparent and the invisible from you.

text.en: Then, you may throw yourself on the tomb, kiss it, and say these words:

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi yabna rasuli allahi

translation.en: My father and mother be sacrificed for you, O son of the Messenger of Allah!

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi ya aba ʿabdillahi

translation.en: My father and mother be sacrificed for you, O Abu `Abdullah!
Extremely terrible was the calamity
and astounding is the misfortune that you suffered upon us

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala jamiʿi ahli alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: and upon all the inhabitants of the heavens and the earth.

segments.transliteration: falaʿana allahu ummatan asrajat wa aljamat

translation.en: Therefore, Allah may curse the people who saddled up, gave rein to their horses,
and prepared themselves to kill you.

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: O my Master, O Abu `Abdullah!
I moved towards your sanctuary
and came to your shrine

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُ ٱللَّهَ بِٱلشَّأْنِ ٱلَّذِي لَكَ عِنْدَهُ
segments.transliteration: as'alu allaha bilshsha'ni alladhi laka ʿindahu

translation.en: beseeching Allah in the name of the standing that you enjoy with Him
and the position that you occupy with Him

segments.arabic: أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an yusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings on Muhammad and on the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يَجْعَلَنِي مَعَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa an yajʿalani maʿakum fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: and to keep me with you in this world and in the Hereafter.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Messenger of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Prophet of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the commander of the faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ ٱلشَّهِيدِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of al-Husayn the martyr.
Peace be upon you, O martyr.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمَظْلُومُ وَٱبْنُ ٱلْمَظْلُومِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ayyuha almazlumu wabnu almazlumi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O wronged and harassed and the son of the wrong and harassed.
Curse of Allah be on those who killed you.
Curse of Allah be on those who persecuted you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذٰلِكَ فَرَضَيِتْ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa laʿana allahu ummatan samiʿat bidhalika faradiyat bihi

translation.en: Curse of Allah be on those who heard this even but rested satisfied.

text.en: You should then throw yourself on the tomb, kiss it, and say the following words:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ وَلِيِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waliyya allahi wabna waliyyihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O intimate servant of Allah and the son of His intimate servant.
Extremely terrible was the calamity
and astounding is the misfortune that you suffered, upon us
and upon all Muslims.
So, curse of Allah be on those who killed you

segments.transliteration: wa abra'u ila allahi wa ilayka minhum

translation.en: and I disavow them in the presence of Allah and You.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَوْلِيَاءَ ٱللَّهِ وَأَحِبَّائَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya awliya'a allahi wa ahibba'ahu

translation.en: Peace be upon all of you, O friends and dears of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَصْفِيَاءَ ٱللَّهِ وَأَوِدَّاءَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya asfiya'a allahi wa awidda'ahu

translation.en: Peace be upon all of you, O choice of Allah and sincerely attached to Him.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ دِينِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya ansara dini allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon all of you, O supporters of Allah's religion.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya ansara rasuli allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon all of you, O supporters of the Messenger of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya ansara amiri almu'minina

translation.en: Peace be upon all of you, O supporters of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ فَاطِمَةَ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya ansara fatimata sayyidati nisa'i alʿalamina

translation.en: Peace be upon all of you, O supporters of Fatimah the doyenne of the women of this world.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya ansara abi muhammadin

translation.en: Peace be upon all of you, O supporters of Abu Muhammad,
al-Hasan the son of `Ali, the saintly and sincere.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ أَبِي عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya ansara abi ʿabdillahi

translation.en: Peace be upon all of you, O supporters of Abu-`Abdullah.
My father and mother be sacrificed for you.

segments.arabic: طِبْتُمْ وَطَابَتِ ٱلأَرْضُ ٱلَّتِي فِيهَا دُفِنْتُمْ
segments.transliteration: tibtum wa tabat al-ardu allati fiha dufintum

translation.en: Verily, pure be you and pure be the soil in which you were buried.
You attained great success.

segments.arabic: فَيَا لَيْتَنِي كُنْتُ مَعَكُمْ فَأَفُوزَ مَعَكُمْ

translation.en: Would that I were with you so that I could also share the accomplishment with you.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ امِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful.
Peace be upon you, O righteous servant (of Allah)
and obedient to Allah and to His Messenger.

segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka qad jahadta wa nasahta

translation.en: I bear witness that you strove (in the way of Allah), acted sincerely,
and tolerated (harm) until death came upon you.

segments.arabic: لَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ لَكُمْ مِنَ ٱلاوَّلِينَ وَٱلآخِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: laʿana allahu alzzalimina lakum min al-awwalina wal-akhirina

translation.en: May Allah curse those who wronged you from the past and the present generations
and may He send them to the lowest layer of the blazing Hell.
O Allah, I take pride in Your religion,
And I honor Your guidance,
And so-and-so humiliates me with his evil,
And insults me with his harm,
And criticizes me for my loyalty to Your friends,
And slanders me with his claims,

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ جِئْتُ إِلى مَوْضِعِ الدُّعاءِ وَضِمانِكَ الاِْجابَةِ ،
segments.transliteration: Wa qad ji’thu ilā mawḍiʿ ad-duʿāʾ wa ḍamānik al-ijābah,

translation.en: And I have come to the place of supplication and Your assurance of response,

segments.arabic: اَللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ،
segments.transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli ʿalā Muḥammad wa āl Muḥammad,

translation.en: O Allah, bless Muḥammad and the family of Muḥammad,
And defend me against him immediately - immediately.
My master, my Imam,
The oppressed seeks aid against his oppressor,
Victory, victory - until the breath stops.

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلايَ وَسَيِّدِي وَابْنَ سَيِّدِي ،
segments.transliteration: As-salāmu ʿalayk yā mawlāya wa sayyidī wa ibn sayyidī,

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O my master and my lord and son of my lord,

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلايَ وَابْنَ مَوْلايَ ،
segments.transliteration: As-salāmu ʿalayk yā mawlāya wa ibn mawlāya,

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O my master and son of my master,
O one slain, son of the one slain,
The martyr, son of the martyr,

segments.transliteration: As-salāmu ʿalayk wa raḥmat Allāh wa barakātuh,

translation.en: Peace be upon you and the mercy of Allah and His blessings,

segments.transliteration: Anā zā’iruka yā ibn Rasūl Allāh,

translation.en: I am visiting you, O son of the Messenger of Allah,
With my heart, my tongue, and my limbs,

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ لَمْ أَزُرْكَ بِنَفْسِي وَالْمُشَاهَدَةِ لِقُبَّتِكَ ،
segments.transliteration: Wa in lam azurka bi-nafsī wa al-mushāhadah li-qubbatik,

translation.en: And if I did not visit you in person and see your dome,

segments.arabic: السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ اللّهِ ،
segments.transliteration: As-salāmu ʿalayk yā wāriṭa Ādam ṣafwat Allāh,

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Adam, the chosen one of Allah,
And inheritor of Noah, the prophet of Allah,
And inheritor of Abraham, the friend of Allah,
And inheritor of Moses, the one who spoke to Allah,
And inheritor of Jesus, the spirit of Allah,

segments.arabic: وَوارِثَ مُحَمَّدٍ حَبِيبِ اللّهِ وَنَبِيِّهِ وَرَسُولِهِ ،
segments.transliteration: Wa wāriṭa Muḥammad ḥabīb Allāh wa nabīyih wa rasūlih,

translation.en: And inheritor of Muhammad, the beloved of Allah and His prophet and messenger,
And inheritor of ʿAlī, the Commander of the Faithful,

segments.transliteration: Wa waṣī Rasūl Allāh wa khalīfatih,

translation.en: And successor of the Messenger of Allah and his caliph,

segments.arabic: وَوَارِثَ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ وَصِيِّ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ،
segments.transliteration: Wa wāriṭa al-Ḥasan ibn ʿAlī waṣī Amīr al-Mu’minīn,

translation.en: And inheritor of al-Ḥasan ibn ʿAlī, the successor of the Commander of the Faithful,

segments.arabic: لَعَنَ اللّهُ قَاتِلَكَ وَجَدَّدَ عَلَيْهِمُ الْعَذَابَ فِي هذِهِ السَّاعَةِ وَفِي كُلِّ سَاعَةٍ ،
segments.transliteration: Laʿana Allāh qātīlak wa jaddad ʿalayhim al-ʿadhāb fī hādhihi as-sāʿah wa fī kull sāʿah,

translation.en: May Allah curse those who killed you and renew the punishment upon them in this moment and in every moment,

segments.arabic: أَنَا يَا سَيِّدِي مُتَقَرِّبٌ إِلى اللّهِ تَعَالى ،
segments.transliteration: Anā yā sayyidī mutaqarrib ilā Allāh taʿālā,

translation.en: I am, O my master, seeking closeness to Allah, the Exalted,
And to your grandfather, the Messenger of Allah,
And to your father, the Commander of the Faithful,
And to your brother, al-Ḥasan,
And to you, O my master,
Upon you be the peace of Allah and His mercy,

segments.arabic: بِزِيَارَتِي لَكَ بِقَلْبِي وَلِسَانِي وَجَمِيعِ جَوَارِحِي ،
segments.transliteration: Bi-ziyāratī laka bi-qalbī wa lisānī wa jamīʿ jawāriḥī,

translation.en: With my visit to you with my heart, my tongue, and all my limbs,

segments.arabic: فَكُنْ يَا سَيِّدِي شَفِيعِي لِقَبُولِ ذلِكَ مِنّي ،
segments.transliteration: Fa-kun yā sayyidī shafīʿī li-qabūl dhālika minnī,

translation.en: So be, O my master, my intercessor for the acceptance of that from me,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا بِالْبَرَاءَةِ مِنْ أَعْدَائِكَ وَاللَّعْنَةِ لَهُمْ وَعَلَيْهِمْ ،
segments.transliteration: Wa anā bi-l-barāʾah min aʿdāʾik wa al-laʿnah lahum wa ʿalayhim,

translation.en: And I disassociate myself from your enemies and curse them and upon them,

segments.arabic: أَتَقَرَّبُ بِذلِكَ إِلى اللّهِ تَعَالى وَإِلَيْكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ ،
segments.transliteration: At-taqarrub bi-dhālika ilā Allāh taʿālā wa ilaykum ajmaʿīn,

translation.en: I seek closeness through that to Allah, the Exalted, and to all of you,

segments.transliteration: Fa-ʿalayk ṣalawāt Allāh wa riḍwānuh wa raḥmatuh.

translation.en: So upon you be the blessings of Allah, His pleasure, and His mercy.

segments.arabic: أَنَا مُوَدِّعُكَ يَا مَوْلايَ وَابْنَ مَوْلايَ وَسَيِّدِي وَابْنَ سَيِّدِي ،
segments.transliteration: Anā muwaddiʿuka yā mawlāya wa ibn mawlāya wa sayyidī wa ibn sayyidī,

translation.en: I am bidding you farewell, O my master and son of my master and my lord and son of my lord,

segments.arabic: وَمُوَدِّعُكَ يَا سَيِّدِي وَابْنَ سَيِّدِي يَا عَلِيَّ بْنَ الْحُسَيْنِ ،
segments.transliteration: Wa muwaddiʿuka yā sayyidī wa ibn sayyidī yā ʿAlī ibn al-Ḥusayn,

translation.en: And I bid you farewell, O my lord and son of my lord, O ʿAlī ibn al-Ḥusayn,

segments.arabic: وَمُوَدِّعُكُمْ يَا سَادَاتِي يَا مَعْشَرَ الشُّهَدَاءِ ،
segments.transliteration: Wa muwaddiʿukum yā sādātī yā maʿshar ash-shuhadā’,

translation.en: And I bid you farewell, O my lords, O group of martyrs,

segments.arabic: فَعَلَيْكُمْ سَلامُ اللّهِ وَرَحْمَتُهُ وَبَركَاتُهُ وَرِضْوَانُهُ
segments.transliteration: Fa-ʿalaykum salām Allāh wa raḥmatuh wa barakātuh wa riḍwānuh

translation.en: So upon you be the peace of Allah, His mercy, His blessings, and His pleasure.

segments.arabic: نبراس الزائر في زيارة الحائرتأليف: مهدي پور, علي اكبرالناشر: مولود كعبه

translation.en: You may then offer a two-unit prayer and when you finish, you may say the following words:

segments.transliteration: allahumma inni sallaytu wa rakaʿtu wa sajadtu

translation.en: O Allah, I have offered a prayer, genuflected, and prostrated myself
for Your sake purely without setting any partner with You
since all prayers, genuflection, and prostration
suit none except You.

segments.arabic: لِأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: li'annaka anta allahu la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Because You are Allah, there in n0 god save You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings on Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa ablighhum ʿanni afdala alssalami walttahiyyati

translation.en: and convey to them my best greetings and compliments
and convey to me their replies.
O Allah, these two units of prayer
are present from me to my master
al-Husayn the son of `Ali, peace be upon both of them.

segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ʿalayhi

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings on Muhammad and on him,

segments.transliteration: wa taqabbal minni wa'jurni ʿala dhalika

translation.en: accept my effort, and reward me for it
in the best rewarding that I anticipate and hope from You

segments.transliteration: wa fi waliyyika ya waliyya almu'minina

translation.en: and from Your saint, O Guardian of the faithful!

text.en: At the door of the Hai'r, you may stop and say the following words:

translation.en: Allah is verily the Most Great.
Very much thanks is due to Allah.

segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi bukratan wa asilan

translation.en: All praise be to Allah in morns and eves.
All praise is due to Allah Who has guided us to this

segments.arabic: وَمَا كُنَّا لِنَهْتَدِيَ لَوْ لاَ أَنْ هَدَانَا ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ma kunna linahtadiya lawla an hadana allahu

translation.en: and we would not have found the way had it not been that Allah guided us.
Certainly, the apostles of our Lord brought the truth.
Peace be upon you, O Messenger of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O Prophet of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O seal of the prophets.
Peace be upon you, O chief of the Messengers.
Peace be upon you, O most beloved by Allah.
Peace be upon you, O commander of the faithful.
Peace be upon you, O chief of the Prophets' successors.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا قَائِدَ ٱلْغُرِّ ٱلْمُحَجَّلِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya qa'ida alghurri almuhajjalina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O leader of the white-forehead and white-footed ones (on the Day of Resurrection).
Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah
the doyenne of the women of this world.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ ٱلأَئِمَّةِ مِنْ وُلْدِكَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka wa ʿala al-a'immati min wuldika

translation.en: Peace be upon you and upon the Imams from your progeny.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَصِيَّ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya wasiyya amiri almu'minina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O successor of the commander of the faithful.
Peace be upon you, O veracious and martyr.
Peace be upon you, O Angels of Allah
who reside in this holy shrine.
Peace be upon you, O my Lord's Angels
who surround the tomb of al-Husayn, peace be upon him.
Peace be upon all of you forever

segments.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu

translation.en: as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu-Abdullah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Messenger of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the commander of the faithful.
I am your slave and son of your slave and bondmaid.
I confess of my servantship to you, acquit from being opposite to you,
accede to any one who accedes to you, and antagonize an yone who antagonizes you.
I direct towards your holy shrine, seek shelter with your (burial) place
and seeking nearness to you through directing to you.
O Messenger of Allah, may I enter?
O Prophet of Allah, may I enter?
O Commander of the faithful, may I enter?
O Chief of the prophets' successors, may I enter?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا فَاطِمَةُ سَيِّدَةَ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya fatimatu sayyidata nisa'i alʿalamina

translation.en: O Fatimah the doyenne of the women of the world, may I enter?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: O my master Abu `Abdullah, may I enter?

segments.arabic: أَأَدْخُلُ يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: a'adkhulu ya mawlaya yabna rasuli allahi

translation.en: O my master and son of the Messenger of Allah, may I enter?

text.en: If you feel that your heart has become submissive and your eyes have become tearful, then that will be the sign of permission to enter. You then should enter and say these words:

translation.en: All praise is due to Allah the One, the Unique,
the Single, the Absolute,
Who has guided me to be loyal to you,
given me exclusively the chance to visit your tomb,
and made it easy for me to direct to you.
In the name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah's Messenger.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيكَ يَا خِيَرَةِ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ خَيرَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya khiyarata allahi wabna khiyaratihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O choicest of Allah and son of His choicest.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful
and son of the chief of the Prophets' successors.
Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah
the doyenne of the women of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ وَٱلْوِتْرَ ٱلْمَوْتُورَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi walwitra almawtura

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O vengeance of Allah, son of His vengeance, and the unavenged so far.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ وَعَلَىٰ ٱلأَرْوَاحِ ٱلَّتِي حَلَّتْ بِفِنَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka wa ʿala al-arwahi allati hallat bifina'ika

translation.en: Peace be upon you and upon the souls that resided in your courtyard.

segments.arabic: عَلَيْكُمْ مِنِّي جَمِيعاً سَلاَمُ ٱللَّهِ أَبَداً
segments.transliteration: ʿalaykum minni jamiʿan salamu allahi abadan

translation.en: Peace of Allah be upon all of you from me forever

segments.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu

translation.en: as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.
O Abu-`Abdullah,
unbearable is the sorrow

segments.transliteration: wa jallat wa ʿazumat almusibatu bika

translation.en: and excruciating and unbearable is the misfortune of you

segments.transliteration: ʿalayna wa ʿala jamiʿi ahli al-islami

translation.en: for us and for all the people of Islam.
Excruciating and unbearable has been your misfortune

segments.arabic: فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ عَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ أَهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ
segments.transliteration: fi alssamawati ʿala jamiʿi ahli alssamawati

translation.en: in the heavens for all the inhabitants of the heavens.

segments.arabic: فَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً أَسَّسَتْ أَسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ وَٱلْجَوْرِ عَلَيْكُمْ أَهْلَ ٱلْبَيْتِ
segments.transliteration: falaʿana allahu ummatan assasat asasa alzzulmi waljawri ʿalaykum ahla albayti

translation.en: So, may Allah curse the people who laid the basis of persecution and wronging against you, O Members of the Household.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً دَفَعَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَقَامِكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa laʿana allahu ummatan dafaʿatkum ʿan maqamikum

translation.en: May Allah curse the people who drove you away from your position

segments.arabic: وَأَزَالَتْكُمْ عَنْ مَرَاتِبِكُمُ ٱلَّتِي رَتَّبَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: wa azalatkum ʿan maratibikum allati rattabakum allahu fiha

translation.en: and removed you away from your ranks that Allah has put you in.
May Allah curse the people who slew you.
May Allah curse those who paved the way for them to do so
and who made possible for them to fight against you.

segments.transliteration: bari'tu ila allahi wa ilaykum minhum

translation.en: I repudiate them in the presence of Allah and You

segments.transliteration: wa min ashyaʿihim wa atbaʿihim wa awliya'ihim

translation.en: and I repudiate their devotees, followers, and loyalists.
O Abu-`Abdullah,
I am at peace with those who are at peace with you

segments.arabic: وَحَرْبٌ لِمَنْ حَارَبَكُمْ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa harbun liman harabakum ila yawmi alqiyamati

translation.en: and I am at war against those who have fought against you up to the Resurrection Day.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ آلَ زِيَادٍ وَآلَ مَرْوَانَ
segments.transliteration: wa laʿana allahu ala ziyadin wa ala marwana

translation.en: May Allah also curse the family of Ziyad and the family of Marwan.

segments.transliteration: wa laʿana allahu bani umayyata qatibatan

translation.en: May Allah also curse the descendants of Umayyah altogether.
May Allah also curse the son of Marjanah.

segments.transliteration: wa laʿana allahu ʿumara bna saʿdin

translation.en: May Allah also curse `Umar the son of Sa`d.
May Allah also curse Shimr.

segments.transliteration: wa laʿana allahu ummatan asrajat wa aljamat

translation.en: May Allah also curse the people who saddled up, gave reins to their horses,
and masked their faces in preparation for fighting against you.
May my father and mother be ransoms for you.
Extremely insufferable is my commiserations with you;

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي أَكْرَمَ مَقَامَكَ وَأَكْرَمَنِي بِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'as'alu allaha alladhi akrama maqamaka wa akramani bika

translation.en: so, I beseech Allah Who has honored your position and honored me because of you
to endue me with the chance to avenge you

segments.arabic: مَعَ إِمَامٍ مَنْصُورٍ مِنْ أَهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: maʿa imamin mansurin min ahli bayti muhammadin

translation.en: with a (Divinely) supported leader from the Household of Muhammad,
peace of Allah be upon him and his Household.
O Allah, (please) make me illustrious in Your sight

segments.arabic: بِٱلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: bilhusayni ʿalayhi alssalamu fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: in the name of al-Husayn, peace be upon him, in this world and in the Hereafter.
O Abu-`Abdullah,

segments.arabic: إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَىٰ رَسُولِهِ
segments.transliteration: inni ataqarrabu ila allahi wa ila rasulihi

translation.en: I do seek nearness to Allah, to His Messenger,

segments.transliteration: wa ila amiri almu'minina wa ila fatimata

translation.en: to the Commander of the Faithful, to Fatimah,

segments.transliteration: wa ila alhasani wa ilayka bimuwalatika

translation.en: to al-Hasan, and to you by means of loyalty to you
and by means of repudiation of those who fought against you
and incurred your hostility,

segments.arabic: وَبِٱلْبَرَاءَةِ مِمَّنْ أَسَّسَ أَسَاسَ ٱلظُّلْمِ وَٱلْجَوْرِ عَلَيْكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa bilbara'ati mimman assasa asasa alzzulmi waljawri ʿalaykum

translation.en: and repudiation of those who laid the basis of persecution and wronging against you all.

segments.transliteration: wa abra'u ila allahi wa ila rasulihi)

translation.en: I also repudiate, in the presence of Allah and His Messenger,
those who laid the basis of all that,
established their foundations on it,

segments.arabic: وَجَرَىٰ فِي ظُلْمِهِ وَجَوْرِهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَعلىٰ أَشْيَاعِكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa jara fi zulmihi wa jawrihi ʿalaykum wa ʿala ashyaʿikum

translation.en: and continued in wronging and persecuting you and your adherents.

segments.transliteration: bari'tu ila allahi wa ilaykum minhum

translation.en: In the presence of Allah and you all do I repudiate these.

segments.transliteration: wa ataqarrabu ila allahi thumma ilaykum

translation.en: And I seek nearness to Allah and then to you all
by means of declaring loyalty to you and to your loyalists
and declaring repudiation of your enemies
and those who incur animosity of you

segments.transliteration: wa bilbara'ati min ashyaʿihim wa atbaʿihim

translation.en: and repudiation of their adherents and followers.
I am verily at peace with those who have been at peace with you,
I am at war against those who fought against you,
loyalist to those who have been loyalist to you,
and enemy of those who have shown enmity towards you.
So, I beseech Allah Who has endued me with the honor of recognizing you
and recognizing your loyalists
and Who conferred upon me with repudiation of your enemies,

segments.arabic: أَنْ يَجْعَلَنِي مَعَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: an yajʿalani maʿakum fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: to include me with you in this world and in the Hereafter

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يُثَبِّتَ لِي عِنْدَكُمْ قَدَمَ صِدْقٍ
segments.transliteration: wa an yuthabbita li ʿindakum qadama sidqin

translation.en: and to make firm step of honesty for me with you
in this world and in the Hereafter.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُهُ أَنْ يُبَلِّغَنِيَ ٱلْمَقَامَ ٱلْمَحْمُودَ لَكُمْ عِنْدَ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluhu an yuballighani almaqama almahmuda lakum ʿinda allahi

translation.en: I also beseech Him to make me attain the praiseworthy status that you enjoy with Allah
and to bestow upon me with the chance to take my own vengeance
with a leader of true guidance who is (Divinely) sustained
and expressing the truth from among you.
I also beseech Allah in your names
and in the name of the standing that you enjoy with Him
to recompense me for my commiserations for you
with the most favorite thing that He ever gives as compensation for misfortunes that has afflicted anyone.
(Your) misfortune has been so astounding
and so catastrophic for Islam
and for all the heavens and the entire earth.
O Allah, (please) make me in this situation of mine

segments.arabic: مِمَّنْ تَنَالُهُ مِنْكَ صَلَوَاتٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ وَمَغْفِرَةٌ
segments.transliteration: mimman tanaluhu minka salawatun wa rahmatun wa maghfiratun

translation.en: one of those who receive blessings, mercy, and forgiveness from You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْ مَحْيَايَ مَحْيَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ijʿal mahyaya mahya muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) make me live my lifetime in the same way as Muhammad and Muhammad's Household lived

segments.transliteration: wa mamati mamata muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: and make me die on the same principles on which Muhammad and Muhammad's Household died.
O Allah, this day
has been regarded as blessed day by the descendants of Umayyah
and by the son of the liver-eater woman,
the accursed and son of the accursed
by the tongue of You and by the tongue of Your Prophet,
Allah's peace be upon him,
on every occasion and in every situation,

segments.arabic: وَقَفَ فِيهِ نَبِيُّكَ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: waqafa fihi nabiyyuka salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi

translation.en: which Your Prophet, Allah's peace be upon him, attended.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱلْعَنْ أَبَا سُفْيَانَ وَمُعَاوِيَةَ وَيَزيدَ بْنَ مُعَاوِيَةَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ilʿan aba sufyana wa muʿawiyata wa yazida bna muʿawiyata

translation.en: O Allah, pour curses upon Abu-Sufyan, Mu`awiyah, and Yazid son of Mu`awiyah.
May Your curse be upon them incessantly and everlastingly.

segments.arabic: وَهٰذَا يَوْمٌ فَرِحَتْ بِهِ آلُ زِيَادٍ وَآلُ مَرْوَانَ
segments.transliteration: wa hadha yawmun farihat bihi alu ziyadin wa alu marwana

translation.en: This is the day on which the family of Ziyad and the family of Marwan gloated
because they had killed al-Husayn, Allah's blessings be upon him.
So, O Allah, pour frequent curses upon them
and double for them the painful chastisement.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَيْكَ فِي هٰذَا ٱلْيَوْمِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ataqarrabu ilayka fi hadha alyawmi

translation.en: O Allah, I do seek nearness to You on this day,
on this occasion,
and on all the days of my lifetime,
by repudiating these and invoking Your curses upon them,

segments.transliteration: wa bilmuwalati linabiyyika wa ali nabiyyika

translation.en: and by declaring loyalty to Your Prophet and Your Prophet's Household,
peace be upon him and them.
O Allah, pour curses upon the foremost persecutor

segments.transliteration: zalama haqqa muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: who usurped the right of Muhammad and Muhammad's Household

segments.transliteration: wa akhira tabiʿin lahu ʿala dhalika

translation.en: and the last follower who acceded to his deed.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱلْعَنِ ٱلْعِصَابَةَ ٱلَّتِي جَاهَدَتِ ٱلْحُسَيْنَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ilʿan alʿisabata allati jahadat alhusayna

translation.en: O Allah, pour curses upon the gang that struggled against al-Husayn

segments.transliteration: wa shayaʿat wa bayaʿat wa tabaʿat ʿala qatlihi

translation.en: and who supported each other against him, paid homage to his enemies, and participated in slaying him.
O Allah, pour curses upon all of them.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala al-arwahi allati hallat bifina'ika

translation.en: and upon the souls that gathered in your courtyard.
Peace of Allah be upon you from me forever

segments.transliteration: ma baqitu wa baqiya allaylu walnnaharu

translation.en: as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ آخِرَ ٱلْعَهْدِ مِنِّي لِزِيَارَتِكُمْ
segments.transliteration: wa la jaʿalahu allahu akhira alʿahdi minni liziyaratikum

translation.en: May Allah not cause this (visit) to be the last of my visit to you (all).
Peace be upon al-Husayn,
upon `Ali ibn al-Husayn,
upon the sons of al-Husayn,
and upon the companions of al-Husayn.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ خُصَّ أَنْتَ أَوَّلَ ظَالِمٍ بِٱللَّعْنِ مِنِّي
segments.transliteration: allahumma khussa anta awwala zalimin billaʿni minni

translation.en: O Allah, pour special curses on the foremost persecutor
and begin with him first,
and then pour curses on the second, the third, and the fourth.
O Allah, curse Yazid fifthly,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْعَنْ عُبَيْدَ ٱللَّهِ بْنَ زِيَادٍ وَٱبْنَ مَرْجَانَةَ
segments.transliteration: walʿan ʿubaydallahi bna ziyadin wabna marjanata

translation.en: and curse `Ubaydullah ibn Ziyad, the son of Marjanah,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿumara bna saʿdin wa shimran

translation.en: `Umar ibn Sa`d, Shimr,

segments.arabic: وَآلَ أَبِي سُفْيَانَ وَآلَ زِيَادٍ وَآلَ مَرْوَانَ
segments.transliteration: wa ala abi sufyana wa ala ziyadin wa ala marwana

translation.en: the family of Abu-Sufyan, the family of Ziyad, and the family of Marwan
up to the Resurrection Day.
O Allah, all praise be to You;
the praise of those who thank You for their misfortunes.
All praise be to Allah for my great misfortune.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱرْزُقْنِي شَفَاعَةَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ يَوْمَ ٱلْوُرُودِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma irzuqni shafaʿata alhusayni yawma alwurudi

translation.en: O Allah, (please) grant me the intercession of al-Husayn on the Day of Coming (to You)

segments.transliteration: wa thabbit li qadama sidqin ʿindaka

translation.en: and make for me with You a firm step of honesty
with al-Husayn and the companions of al-Husayn

segments.arabic: ٱلَّذينَ بَذَلُوٱ مُهَجَهُمْ دُونَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ

translation.en: who sacrificed their souls in defense of al-Husayn, peace be upon him.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا اَمِيْنَ اللّٰهِ فِيْ اَرْضِهٖ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya amina allahi fi ardihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O trustee of Allah on His lands
and argument of Allah against His servants.
Peace be upon you, O Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: اَشْهَدُ اَنَّكَ جَاهَدْتَ فِي اللّٰهِ حَقَّ جِهَادِهٖ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka jahadta fi allahi haqqa jihadihi

translation.en: I bear witness that you strove for the sake of Allah as it ought to be striven,
acted upon His Book,
and followed the instructions of His Prophet,
peace of Allah be upon him and his Household,
until Allah called you to be in His vicinity.
So, He grasped you to Him by His will
and put your enemies under the claim

segments.arabic: مَعَ مَالَكَ مِنَ الْحُجَجِ الْبَالِغَۃِ عَلٰي جَمِيْعِ خَلْقِهٖ
segments.transliteration: maʿa ma laka min alhujaji albalighati ʿala jamiʿi khalqihi

translation.en: although you have inclusive claims against all of His creatures.
O Allah, (please do) cause my soul to be fully tranquil with Your decrees,
satisfied with Your acts,
fond of mentioning and praying to You,
bearing love for the choicest of Your intimate servants,
beloved in Your lands and heavens,
steadfast against the affliction of Your tribulations,
thankful for Your graceful bounties,
always bearing in mind Your incessant gifts,
longing for the gladness of meeting You,
supplied with piety for the day of Your rewarding,
pursuing the morals of Your intimate servants,
quitting the conducts of Your enemies,

segments.arabic: مَشْغُوْلَۃً عَنِ الدُّنْيَا بِحَمْدِكَ وَ ثَنَاۤئِكَ۔
segments.transliteration: mashghulatan ʿan alddunya bihamdika wa thana'ika

translation.en: and distracted from this world by praising and thanking You.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اِنَّ قُلُوْبَ الْمُخْبِتِيْنَ اِلَيْكَ وَالِهَۃٌ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna quluba almukhbitina ilayka walihatun

translation.en: O Allah, the hearts of those humbling themselves to You are fascinated,
the paths of those desiring for You are open,
the sings of those directing to You are evident,
the hearts of those having recognition of You are resorting to You,
the voices of those beseeching You are mounting up to You,
the doors of responding to them are wide open,
the prayer of him who speaks to You confidentially is responded,

segments.arabic: وَ تَوْبَۃَ مَنْ اَنَابَ اِلَيْكَ مَقْبُوْلَۃٌ
segments.transliteration: wa tawbata man anaba ilayka maqbulatun

translation.en: the repentance of him who turns to You modestly is admitted,

segments.arabic: وَ عَبْرَۃَ مَنْ بَكٰي مِنْ خَوْفِكَ مَرْحُوْمَۃٌ
segments.transliteration: wa ʿabrata man baka min khawfika marhumatun

translation.en: the tear of him who weeps on account of fear from You is compassionated,

segments.arabic: و وَ الْاِغَاثَۃَ لِمَنِ اسْتَغَاثَ بِكَ مَوْجُوْدَۃٌ

translation.en: the aid of him who seeks Your aid is available,

segments.arabic: وَ الْاِعَانَۃَ لِمَنِ اسْتَعَانَ بِكَ مَبْذُوْلَۃٌ

translation.en: the help of him who seeks Your help is obtainable,
Your promises to Your servants are fulfilled,
the slips of him who implore You to excuse him are forgivable,
the deeds of those who act for You are preserved,

segments.arabic: وَ اَرْزَاقَكَ اِلَي الْخَلَاۤئِقِ مِنْ لَّدُنْكَ نَازِلَۃٌ
segments.transliteration: wa arzaqaka ila alkhala'iqi min ladunka nazilatun

translation.en: Your sustenance to the creatures are descending from You,
Your gifts for further conferrals are reaching them,
the sins of those imploring Your forgiveness are forgiven,
the requests of Your creatures are granted by You,
the prizes of those begging You are offered,
Your gifts for further conferrals are uninterrupted,
the dining tables for those seeking Your feeding are prepared,
and the springs of quenching their thirst are brimful.
O Allah, (so) respond to my prayer,
accept my thanksgiving for You,

segments.arabic: وَ اجْمَعْ بَيْنِيْ وَ بَيْنَ اَوْلِيَاۤئِيْ

translation.en: and join me to my masters,
[I beseech You] in the name of Muhammad, `Ali,
Fatimah, al-Hasan, and al-Husayn.
You are verily the only source of my boons,
the ultimate goal of my wishes,

segments.arabic: وَ غَايَۃُ رَجَاۤئِيْ فِيْ مُنْقَلَبِيْ وَ مَثْوَايَ۔
segments.transliteration: wa ghayatu raja'i fi munqalabi wa mathwaya

translation.en: and the target of my hope in my recourses and settlement.

segments.arabic: اَنْتَ اِلٰهِيْ وَ سَيَّدِيْ وَ مَوْلَايَ
segments.transliteration: anta ilahi wa sayyidi wa mawlaya

translation.en: You are verily my God, Master, and Lord.
(Please) forgive our friend,
prevent our enemies against us,
distract them from harming us,
give prevalence to the Word of Truth
and make it the supreme,
and frustrate the word of falsehood
and make it the lowliest.
Verily, You have power over all things.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْاِمَامُ وَ رَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهٗ اَسْتَوْدِعُكَ اللهَ وَ عَلَيْكَ السَّلَامُ وَ رَحْمَةُ اللهِ وَ بَرَكَاتُهٗ.
segments.transliteration: assalaamo a’layka ayyohal emaamo wa rahmatul laahe wa barakaatohu as-tawde-o’kal laaha wa a’laykas salaamo wa rahmatul laahe wa barakaatoh.

translation.en: Peace be on you, O the Imam and mercy of Allah and His blessings, I entrust you with Allah and upon you is peace and mercy of Allah and His blessings.

segments.arabic: اٰمَنَّا بِالرَّسُوْلِ وَ بِمَا جِئْتُمْ بِهٖ وَ دَعَوْتُمْ اِلَيْهِ.
segments.transliteration: aamannaa bir-rasoole wa bemaa jeatum behi da-a’wtum elayhe.

translation.en: We believe in the Messenger, and in whatever you have come with and called to.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَا تَجْعَلْهُ اٰخِرَ الْعَهْدِ مِنْ زِيَارَتِيْ وَلِيَّكَ.
segments.transliteration: allaahumma laa taj-a’lho aakheral a’hde min zeyaaratee waliyyaka.

translation.en: O Allah! Do not make this my last visitation of Your master.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ لَا تَحْرِمْنِيْ ثَوَابَ مَزَارِهِ الَّذِيْ اَوْجَبْتَ لَهٗ وَ يَسِّرْ لَنَا الْعَوْدَ اِلَيْهِ اِنْ شَآءَ اللهُ تَعَالٰى.
