segments.transliteration: allaahumma laa tahrimnee sawaaba mazaarehil lazee awjabta lahu wa yassir lanal a’wda elayhe in shaaa allaaho ta-a’alaa.

translation.en: O Allah! Do not deprive me of the reward of his shrine which You have decided for him and make our returning to visit it easy for us, if Allah – the High – wish.
O Allah, (please) convey to my master the Patron of the Age,
Allah's blessings be upon him,
on behalf of all the believing men and women
in the east and west sides of the earth,
in its lands and oceans,
in its plains and mountains,
and both the alive and the dead,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿan walidayya wa wuldi wa ʿanni

translation.en: and on behalf of my parents, my descendants, and me,
(convey to him) such blessings and greetings
that are as heavy as the measure of the Throne of Allah,
as much as the ink of His words,
as endless as His pleasure,
and as many as all that which has been calculated by His Books
and comprehended by His knowledge.
O Allah, I update to him
on this day
and on all days

segments.transliteration: ʿahdan wa ʿaqdan wa bayʿatan fi raqabati

translation.en: a pledge, a covenant, and an allegiance to which I commit up to my neck.
O Allah, just as You have endued me with this honor,
conferred upon me this virtue,
and granted me exclusively this bounty,
so also (please) send blessings upon my master and chief,
the patron of the age,
and make me of his supporters,
adherents, and defenders,
and make me of those who will be martyred in his presence,
with full willingness and without compulsion,

segments.arabic: فِي ٱلصَّفِّ ٱلَّذِي نَعَتَّ أَهْلَهُ فِي كِتَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: fi alssaffi alladhi naʿatta ahlahu fi kitabika

translation.en: in the line whose people have been described in Your Book
where You say, "… one line as if they were a firm and compact wall,"
and with obedience to You
and obedience to Your Messenger and his Household,
peace be upon them.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ هٰذِهِ بَيْعَةٌ لَهُ فِي عُنُقِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma hadhihi bayʿatun lahu fi ʿunuqi

translation.en: O Allah, this is my allegiance to him that is involved in my neck
up to the Resurrection Day.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا حُجَّةَ ٱللَّهِ فِي أَرْضِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya hujjata allahi fi ardihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O argument of Allah in His lands!

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا عَيْنَ ٱللَّهِ فِي خَلْقِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya ʿayna allahi fi khalqihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O sight of Allah on His creatures!
Peace be upon you, O light of Allah
by which those who have been guided [to the true guidance] are guided
and by which the believers are relieved!
Peace be upon you, O polite and fearful!
Peace be upon you, O sincere patron!
Peace be upon you, O ark of salvation!
Peace be upon you, O essence of life!
Peace be upon you.
May Allah send blessings to you
and upon your Household,
the pure and immaculate.
Peace be upon you.
May Allah hasten that which He has promised you;
namely, victory and prevalence of your authority.
Peace be upon you, O my master.
I am a servant of you
and I recognize the first and the last of your affair.

segments.arabic: أَتَقَرَّبُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ تَعَالَىٰ بِكَ وَبِآلِ بَيْتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ataqarrabu ila allahi taʿala bika wa bi-ali baytika

translation.en: I seek nearness to Allah, the Exalted, through your Household and you

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَظِرُ ظُهُورَكَ وَظُهُورَ ٱلْحَقِّ عَلَىٰ يَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa antaziru zuhuraka wa zuhura alhaqqi ʿala yadayka

translation.en: and I am expecting your advent and the prevalence of the truth at your hands.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُ ٱللَّهَ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa as'alu allaha an yusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: And I beseech Allah to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa an yajʿalani mina almuntazirina laka

translation.en: and to include me with those who are expecting you,
those who follow you and support you against your enemies,

segments.arabic: وَٱلْمُسْتَشْهَدِينَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ فِي جُمْلَةِ أَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: walmustash-hadina bayna yadayka fi jumlati awliya'ika

translation.en: and those who will be martyred in front of you in the group of your loyalists.
O my master, O Patron of the Age!
May Allah's blessings be upon you
and upon your Household.
Today is Friday,

segments.transliteration: wa huwa yawmuka almutawaqqaʿu fihi zuhuruka

translation.en: which is your day on which your advent is expected
to bring about relief to the believers at your hands,
and killing of the disbelievers with your sword.

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا يَا مَوْلاَيَ فِيهِ ضَيْفُكَ وَجَارُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ana ya mawlaya fihi dayfuka wa jaruka

translation.en: On this day, O my master, I am your guest and in your vicinity

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ يَا مَوْلاَيَ كَرِيمٌ مِنْ أَوْلاَدِ ٱلْكِرَامِ
segments.transliteration: wa anta ya mawlaya karimun min awladi alkirami

translation.en: and you, my master, are generous and the descendant of the generous people,
and you are commanded to receive your guests and neighbors hospitably;
so, receive me as your guest and neighbor.
May Allah's blessings be upon you
and upon your Household, the immaculate.

text.en: Rewards of visitation
Merits
Ziyarat

translation.en: Allah is the Most Great of all.
All praise be to Allah very much.

segments.transliteration: wa subhana allahi bukratan wa asilan

translation.en: Glory be to Allah in mornings and evenings.
All praise be to Allah Who has guided us to this.

segments.arabic: وَمَا كُنَّا لِنَهْتَدِيَ لَوْلاَ أَنْ هَدَانَا ٱللَّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ma kunna linahtadiya lawla an hadana allahu

translation.en: We would not have been guided if Allah had not guided us.
The messengers of our Lord have indeed come with the truth.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala rasuli allahi salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi

translation.en: Peace be upon the Messenger of Allah, peace of Allah be upon him and his Household.
Peace be upon the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿala fatimata alzzahra'i sayyidati nisa'i alʿalamina

translation.en: Peace be upon Fatimah the luminous and the doyenne of all women of the world.
Peace be upon al-Hasan and al-Husayn.
Peace be upon `Ali the son of al-Husayn.
Peace be upon Muhammad the son of `Ali.
Peace be upon Ja`far the son of Muhammad.
Peace be upon Musa the son of Ja`far.
Peace be upon `Ali the son of Musa.
Peace be upon Muhammad the son of `Ali.
Peace be upon `Ali the son of Muhammad.
Peace be upon al-Hasan the son of `Ali.
Peace be upon the virtuous Successor and Awaited.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu-`Abdullah.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah's Messenger.
I—the servant of you and the son of your servant and your bondwoman,
who is loyal to those who are loyal to you
and enemy of those who are your enemies—
am seeking the shelter of your shrine
and seeking nearness to Allah through directing to you.
All praise be to Allah Who guided me to be loyal to you,
Who conferred upon me with my visiting you,
and Who made easy for me to direct to you.

text.en: You may then enter the shrine, stop next to the side of the Imam's head, and say the following words:

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha adama safwati allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Adam the chosen by Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha nuhin nabiyyi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Noah the prophet of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha ibrahima khalili allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Abraham the friend of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ كَلِيمِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha musa kalimi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Moses the spoken by Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيسَىٰ رُوحِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha ʿisa ruhi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Jesus the spirit of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدٍ حَبِيبِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha muhammadin habibi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Muhammad the most beloved by Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha amiri almu'minina

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waritha fatimata alzzahra'i

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Fatimah the luminous.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيكَ يَا بْنَ محَمَّدٍ ٱلْمُصْطَفَىٰ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Muhammad the well-chosen prophet.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ عَلِيٍّ ٱلْمُرْتَضَىٰ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of `Ali the well-pleased.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah the luminous.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَدِيـجَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Khadijah the grand lady.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O vengeance of Allah and son of His vengeance
and the unavenged sanctity.
I bear witness that you performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rates,
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,

segments.transliteration: wa ataʿta allaha hatta ataka alyaqinu

translation.en: and obeyed Allah until death came upon you.
May Allah curse the people who slew you.
May Allah curse the people who wronged you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذٰلِكَ فَرَضِيَتْ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa laʿana allahu ummatan samiʿat bidhalika faradiyat bihi

translation.en: May Allah curse the people who were informed about that but they approved it.

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: ya mawlaya ya aba ʿabdi allahi

translation.en: O my master! O Abu-`Abdullah!
I call Allah, His angels,
His Prophets, and His Messengers
to witness that I believe in you and in your Return

segments.transliteration: muqinun bisharayiʿi dini wa khawatimi ʿamali

translation.en: and I have faith in the laws of my religion and in the sealing deeds of mine,
and in my final return to my Lord.
Allah's blessings be upon you all,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala arwahikum wa ʿala ajsadikum

translation.en: upon your souls, upon your bodies,

segments.transliteration: wa ʿala shahidikum wa ʿala gha'ibikum

translation.en: upon the present and the absent (of your group),
and upon the manifest and the hidden (of your affairs).

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَاتَمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Seal of Prophets,
son of the chief of the Prophets' successors,
son of the leader of the pious,

segments.arabic: وَٱبْنَ قَائِدِ ٱلْغُرِّ ٱلْمُحَجَّلِينَ إِلَىٰ جَنَّاتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
segments.transliteration: wabna qa'idi alghurri almuhajjalina ila jannati alnnaʿimi

translation.en: and son of the white-forehead, marked believers.
How can that you be anything other than this
while you are the door to the true guidance,
the guide to piety,
the firmest handle,
the argument against the inhabitants of this world,
and the fifth of the People of the Cloak.
You were nourished by the hand of mercy,
breast-fed by the bosom of faith,
and brought up in the lap of Islam.
So, my soul is definitely displeased by the way you left this world
and it has no doubt that you are alive.
Allah's blessings be upon you,
your ascendants, and your descendants.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا صَرِيعَ ٱلْعَبْرَةِ ٱلسَّاكِبَةِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya sariʿa alʿabrati alssakibati

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O object of the pouring tears
and match of the astounding misfortune.

segments.arabic: لَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً ٱسْتَحَلَّتْ مِنْكَ ٱلْمَحَارِمَ
segments.transliteration: laʿana allahu ummatan istahallat minka almaharima

translation.en: May Allah curse the people who violated your sanctities
and infringed the holiness of Islam.
So, you—may Allah's blessings be upon you—were killed overwhelmed,

segments.arabic: وَأَصْبَحَ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ بِكَ مَوْتُوراً
segments.transliteration: wa asbaha rasulu allahi salla allahu ʿalayhi wa alihi bika mawturan

translation.en: the Messenger of Allah, Allah's blessings be upon him and his Household, became cut off because of loss of you,

segments.transliteration: wa asbaha kitabu allahi bifaqdika mahjuran

translation.en: and the Book of Allah became deserted due to losing you.

segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka wa ʿala jaddika wa abika

translation.en: Peace be upon you, your grandfather, your father,
your mother, your brother,
the Imams from your descendants,
those who were martyred with you,
and the angels who are surrounding your tomb,
witnessing for your visitors,
and praying for the acceptance of the prayers of your adherents.

segments.transliteration: walssalamu ʿalayka wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah's mercy and blessings be upon you.

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi yabna rasuli allahi

translation.en: May my father and mother be ransoms for you, O son of Allah's Messenger.

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi ya aba ʿabdi allahi

translation.en: May my father and mother be ransoms for you, O Abu-`Abdullah.
So unbearable is the misfortune
and so horrendous is the calamity of you

segments.arabic: عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ أَهْلِ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: ʿalayna wa ʿala jamiʿi ahli alssamawati wal-ardi

translation.en: for us and for all the inhabitants of the heavens and the earth.

segments.transliteration: falaʿana allahu ummatan asrajat wa aljamat

translation.en: May Allah curse the people who put saddles and reins on their animals
and readied themselves for fighting against you.

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: ya mawlaya ya aba ʿabdi allahi

translation.en: O my master! O Abu-`Abdullah!
I have directed to your sanctuary
and I have come to your shrine

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُ ٱللَّهَ بِٱلشَّأْنِ ٱلَّذِي لَكَ عِنْدَهُ
segments.transliteration: as'alu allaha bilshsha'ni alladhi laka ʿindahu

translation.en: asking Almighty Allah in the name of the standing that you enjoy with Him
and in the name of the position that you occupy with him

segments.arabic: أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an yusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يَجْعَلَنِي مَعَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa an yajʿalani maʿakum fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: and to include me with your group in this world and in the Hereafter,
out of His favor, magnanimity, and generosity.

text.en: You may then kiss the tomb and offer a two-unit prayer in which you may recite any Surah you wish. Upon accomplishment, you may say the following dua:

segments.transliteration: allahumma inni sallaytu wa rakaʿtu wa sajadtu

translation.en: O Allah, I have offered a prayer, genuflected, and prostrated myself
for Your sake purely without setting any partner with You,
since all prayers, genuflections, and prostrations
suit none except You.

segments.arabic: لِأَنَّكَ أَنْتَ ٱللَّهُ لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: li'annaka anta allahu la ilaha illa anta

translation.en: Because You are Allah; there in no god save You.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa ablighhum ʿanni afdala alttahiyyati walssalami

translation.en: convey to them my best greetings and compliments,
and convey to me their replies to my greetings and compliments.
O Allah, these two units of prayer

segments.arabic: هَدِيَّةٌ مِنِّي إِلَىٰ مَوْلاَيَ وَسَيِّدِي وَإِمَامِي
segments.transliteration: hadiyyatun minni ila mawlay wa sayyidi w aimami

translation.en: are present from me to my master, chief, and leader,
al-Husayn the son of `Ali, peace be upon both of them.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَتَقَبَّلْ ذٰلِكَ مِنِّي وَٱجْزِنِي عَلَىٰ ذٰلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa taqabbal dhalika minni wa'jurni ʿala dhalika

translation.en: and accept that from me and reward me for it

segments.arabic: أَفْضَلَ أَمَلِي وَرَجَائِي فِيكَ وَفِي وَلِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: afdala amali wa raja'i fika wa fi waliyyika

translation.en: in the best rewarding that I anticipate and hope from You and from Your saint.
O most merciful of all those who show mercy!

text.en: Ziyarah of Ali ibn Husayn (peace be upon him)

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah's Messenger.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah's Prophet.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ ٱلشَّهِيدِ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of al-Husayn the martyr.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلشَّهِيدُ ٱبْنُ ٱلشَّهِيدِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ayyuha alshshahidu ibnu alshshahidi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O martyr and son of the martyr.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمَظْلُومُ وَٱبْنُ ٱلْمَظْلُومِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ayyuha almazlumu wabnu almazlumi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O persecuted and son of the persecuted.
May Allah curse the people who slew you.
May Allah curse the people who wronged you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذٰلِكَ فَرَضَيِتْ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa laʿana allahu ummatan samiʿat bidhalika faradayit bihi

translation.en: May Allah curse the people who were informed of that and they approved it.
Peace be upon you, O my master.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ وَلِيِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka ya waliyya allahi wabna waliyyihi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah's friend and son of His friend.
Unbearable is the misfortune
and so horrendous is the calamity of you
for us and for all faithful believers.
May Allah curse the people who slew you.

segments.arabic: وَأَبْرَأُ إِلَىٰ ٱللَّهِ وَإِلَيْكَ مِنْهُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa abra'u ila allahi wa ilayka minhum fi alddunya wal-akhirati

translation.en: I release myself in the presence of Allah and you from these people in this world and in the Hereafter.

text.en: Ziyarah of the Martyrs

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَوْلِيَاءَ ٱللَّهِ وَأَحِبَّاءَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya awliya'a allahi wa ahibba'ahu

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Allah's friends and beloved by him.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَصْفِيَاءَ ٱللَّهِ وَأَوِدَّاءَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya asfiya'a allahi wa awidda'ahu

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O choices of Allah and His favorites.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ دِينِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya ansara dini allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O supporters of Allah's Religion,
supporters of His Prophet,
supporters of the Commander of the Faithful,

segments.transliteration: wa ansara fatimata sayyidati nisa'i alʿalamina

translation.en: and supporters of Fatimah the doyenne of the women of the world.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya ansara abi muhammadin

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O supporters of Abu-Muhammad
al-Hasan the sincere saint.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ أَبِي عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalaykum ya ansara abi ʿabdi allahi

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O supporters of Abu-`Abdullah
al-Husayn the wronged martyr.
Blessings of Allah be upon them all.
May my father and mother be your ransoms.

segments.arabic: طِبْتُمْ وَطَابَتِ ٱلأَرْضُ ٱلَّتِي فِيهَا دُفِنْتُمْ
segments.transliteration: tibtum wa tabat al-ardu allati fiha dufintum

translation.en: Pure are you, and pure is the soil in which you were buried.
And, by Allah, great is your triumph.

segments.arabic: يَا لَيْتَنِي كُنْتُ مَعَكُمْ فَأَفُوزَ مَعَكُمْ
segments.transliteration: ya laytani kuntu maʿakum fa'afuza maʿakum

translation.en: I wish I were with you so that I would have won with you
in the gardens of Paradise with the martyrs and the righteous.
Excellent is the companionship of these.

segments.transliteration: walssalamu ʿalaykum wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu

translation.en: Peace and Allah's mercy and blessings be upon you all.

text.en: Ziyarah of 'Abbas ibn Ali (peace be upon him)

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O Abu'l-Fadl
al-`Abbas son of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ سَيِّدِ ٱلْوَصِيِّينَ

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the Prophets' successors.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَوَّلِ ٱلْقَوْمِ إِسْلاَماً
segments.transliteration: alssalamu ʿalayka yabna awwali alqawmi islaman

translation.en: Peace be upon you, O son of the foremost in accepting Islam,
the leading in having faith in it,
the most perfect in carrying out the laws of Allah's religion,
and the most careful for Islam.

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ لَقَدْ نَصَحْتَ لِلَّهِ وَلِرَسُولِهِ وَلأَخِيكَ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu laqad nasahta lillahi wa lirasulihi wa li'akhika

translation.en: I bear witness that you have acted sincerely for the sake of Allah, His Messenger, and your brother.
So, how excellent sacrificing brother you are!
May Allah curse the people who slew you.
May Allah curse the people who wronged you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً ٱسْتَحَلَّتْ مِنْكَ ٱلْمَحَارِمَ
segments.transliteration: wa laʿana allahu ummatan istahallat minka almaharima

translation.en: May Allah curse the people who violated your sanctities
and infringed the holiness of Islam when they killed you.
Most excellent steadfast, striver brother,
defender, supporter,
one who stood up for his brother,
one who responded to the obedience to his Lord,
and one who desired for what others deemed unworthy;
namely, the abundant reward and the excellent praise you are.
May Allah attach you to the rank of your ancestors
in the Abode of Bliss.

text.en: You may then throw yourself on the tomb and say the following words:

translation.en: O Allah, I am presenting myself before You
and I am intending to visit your intimate servants,
for I desire for gaining Your reward
and I hope for Your forgiveness
and abundant benevolence.

segments.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: fa'as'aluka an tusalliya ʿala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin

translation.en: So, I beseech You to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa an tajʿala rizqi bihim darran

translation.en: and, (I beseech You) in their names, to make my sustenance unstoppable,
my life peaceful,
my pilgrimage admissible,
my life serene,
and my sins forgiven.
And (I beseech You to) make me return from them with success and prosperity,
having my prayers granted,
with the best things with which any one
of his visitors and comers may return;
in the name of Your mercy, O most merciful of all those who show mercy.
